subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from the presence of God, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, it is, in itself, the Spirit of Life amidst all created things and the Source of the Sacred Scrolls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم انه بنفسه لروح الحیوان بین الامکان و مبدء صحف
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
